title: CSTM DeckedOut
description: This is just a quickly thrown together mod for the CSTMGames community to more easily facilitate playing Decked Out by making a custom block for vacuum hopper and nbt matching purposes.
body:
This is just a quickly thrown together mod for the CSTMGames community to more easily facilitate playing Decked Out by making a custom block for vacuum hopper and nbt matching purposes.

 

This mod adds... Filtering block simmilar to a hopper but only checks y+2 above it for the item with matching code that has been set on its filter item by the in game command.

 

 

Also contains the custom items needed to play Decked Out such as the Custom item for entrance into Decked out minigame and 4 special mobs for players to face.
